subcodes.first_line: Lo, the Beloved calleth aloud: "The Best-Beloved hath come with manifest sovereignty!" And the Spirit proclaimeth before His face: "That which hath appeared..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الحبیب ینادی قد اتی المحبوب بسلطان مبین و الروح ینادی امام الوجه قد ظهر ما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @consolation and comfort, @proclamation to the people of the world
